tools.name: verify
tools.description: An outside check on code, executed in a sealed sandbox. Call it before code crosses a consequence boundary: before you merge it, deploy it, publish it, settle a payout on it, or report it done. A self-audit verifies consistency, never completeness: a check written inside the frame that produced the

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "verify" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "verify" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
